posts.cookedHtml:
CRM AAE1920×1080 191 KB

Got questions about monday CRM?
Want to share feedback, learn what’s coming next, or connect directly with the team building it?

Tomorrow - November 18 - our CRM team will be live on Reddit for a full session!

Starting at 8:30 AM ET / 1:30 PM GMT

It’s your chance to ask, suggest, and shape what’s coming.

Join our subreddit so you’re ready!
